title: settings.observing keys (spec 044 Track B)
description: Value sub-schemas for the observing-site settings keys this feature adds to the spec-018 settings store. These keys extend the `settings.get` / `settings.update` key set (see specs/018-settings-configuration-model/contracts/); NO new Tauri command is introduced. Astronomy computation runs in the frontend and is non-persisted, so it has no contract surface (ADR-0001).
$comment: Register these keys in the settings key enum (dotted-key convention, cf. target_lookup.active_catalogs) and add each value sub-schema to settings.state.v1.json.

keys.description: New settings keys and the value each carries.

timezone.description: IANA timezone id (e.g. Europe/Amsterdam), chosen from a bundled list; no online lookup.

twilight.description: Per-site night definition. astronomical = Sun -18, nautical = Sun -12.

minHorizonAltDeg.description: Local-obstruction floor; standard refraction still applied at the true horizon.

ObserverSiteArray.description: Named observing-site collection. Empty = no-site state (US6). Site ids MUST be unique.

SiteIdOrNull.description: Must reference an existing ObserverSite.id or be null. At most one default, at most one active; both must stay valid across edits/deletes.

UsableAltitudeDeg.description: Global lowest-worthwhile altitude. Replaces the localStorage ALTITUDE_THRESHOLD_KEY and the USABLE_ALT_DEG constant.
